name: CLIMB Works Keana Farms
tagline: Eight ziplines over a working North Shore farm with panoramic ocean and mountain views — Oahu's best zipline, period.
parking: Free on-site parking. Check in 40 minutes before tour time
bestTime: Morning tours for cooler temps and best light on the Ko'olau mountains. Book at least 5 days ahead during busy season
kamaaina: 25% kamaaina discount with valid Hawaii ID — brings price from $169 to about $127
talkStory: Built on Gunstock Ranch's 450-acre working farm in Kahuku, CLIMB Works was founded by a family of adventure operators from Tennessee who partnered with local landowners. The eight dual ziplines -- up to half a mile long -- follow agricultural ridgelines where workers once harvested macadamia nuts by hand. Perfect 5.0 Google rating with 8,500+ reviews. Kids as young as 5 can ride tandem with a guide, making it one of the few family-friendly zipline experiences in Hawaii.
